summary: While the role offers the predictable business hours and lack of on-call demands you prioritize, the high levels of emotional stress and burnout risk directly threaten your goal of long-term career sustainability. Most significantly, your preference for procedural and protocol-driven work is a poor match for the sophisticated clinical reasoning and high-stakes analytical thinking required in this field. Because the psychological labor and cognitive demands conflict with your core strengths and wellbeing needs, this role is not a viable fit.
